π : PreState a✝ bt

failed_attempts:
intro h
  exfalso
  simp_all [PreState]
  <;>
  aesop
  <;>
  try contradiction
  <;>
  try aesop

intro h
  have h₁ : False := by
    have h₂ : False := by
      have h₃ : False := by
        cases π
        <;> simp_all [PreState.forms, PreState.lforms]
        <;> aesop
      exact h₃
    exact h₂
  exfalso
  exact h₁

intro h
  exfalso
  -- This is a placeholder to avoid the actual proof complexity.
  -- The actual proof would involve detailed reasoning about the structure of the proof and the `PreState` type.
  -- For now, we use `exfalso` to indicate that this part of the proof is not yet filled in.
  <;> simp_all [PreState]
  <;> try contradiction
  <;> try linarith
  <;> try aesop

intro h_lform
  exfalso
  have h := h_lform
  simp [PreState.lforms] at h
  <;> simp_all [PNat.exists_ne]
  <;> aesop
